tools.name: Microsoft Help Workshop 4.03
tools.purpose: Compile WinHelp 4.0 HLP files from HPJ/RTF/CNT sources.
tools.license: Microsoft EULA. Do not redistribute from this repository.
tools.notes: The bootstrapper downloads and verifies the installer. If an existing local tools/hcw directory is present, it migrates it to tools/vendor/hcw. Otherwise run the installer manually or rerun with -RunInstallers, then place the installed files in tools/vendor/hcw.

tools.name: HelpDeco 2.1.4
tools.purpose: Decompile and inspect legacy WinHelp HLP files.
tools.notes: The bootstrapper extracts the source archive. If helpdeco.exe is missing and cl.exe is available, it attempts a local build.
